aboutPreview.lead: We support children, young people, and clubs with a clear training approach that combines athletic development, enjoyment of the game, and a positive learning environment.
aboutPreview.point1Text: Clear content, modern training organization, and easy-to-understand processes.
aboutPreview.point2Text: Support tailored to age, level, and development.
aboutPreview.mediaCaption: Insights into our work with children, young people, and clubs.

hero.title: Build football skills. Strengthen children.
hero.lead: Modern training programs for camps, development training, kindergarten and individual training – with clear structure, joy of the game and personal growth.

values.title: What defines us
values.card2Text: We work with structure and quality.
values.card3Text: We strengthen children in sport and life.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About the Football School

sideCard.title: We are happy to help
sideCard.text: If you have questions about training formats, registration, or processes, feel free to contact us directly at any time.

items.question: Where do we train?
items.answer: Our training programs take place at selected locations, on sports grounds of partner clubs, and in suitable indoor facilities across NRW. Depending on the format, age group, and season, we choose the training environment so that children and young people can train under good conditions.

items.question: Who are our programs suitable for?
items.answer: Our programs are designed for children and young people of different age groups and performance levels. Depending on the format, there are suitable groups both for beginners and for children who want to improve their sporting development in a targeted way.

items.question: How do I stay informed about new programs?
items.answer: You can find current information about courses, camps, available spots, and organisational updates directly on our website. In addition, we regularly share new offers and important updates through our channels.

items.question: How does getting started with us work?
items.answer: Getting started is simple. You can first choose a suitable program and send an enquiry or booking. After that, you will receive all important information about the process, dates, and the next steps.

portal.eyebrow: Digital content for coaches, teams, and ambitious players
portal.text: Access drills, training ideas, and structured content. Use the library to prepare your sessions and develop your coaching work step by step.

team.title: Meet our coaching team
team.lead: Experienced coaches. Real passion. One shared mission: unlocking every player's potential – on and off the pitch.
team.fact1Text: Targeted support with a clear focus on technique, attitude, and game understanding.
team.fact2Text: Clear content, modern training methods, and easy-to-follow processes.
team.fact3Text: Close guidance for every player – on and off the pitch.
